name: email-ingest
description: Cloudflare Worker that turns inbound Google Alerts emails into notify.created.v1 CloudEvents on the Notify pipeline.
//comment: Versions intentionally pinned (no ^ ranges) for supply-chain hygiene. cd-worker.yml runs `npm ci` so the package-lock.json (committed) is the source of truth. To bump a dep: edit the exact version below + `rm package-lock.json` + `npm install` + commit both files together so reviewers can diff the resolved tree.
